title: Update to actions/stale@v3
body:
Try more recent `stale` release… as currently with `v1`, `remove-stale-when-updated` is set but isn't causing labels to be updated when comments are added.

Relates to: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/9258#issuecomment-841825306

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body: Needs a signoff - can you `git commit --amend -s` and re-push?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *srcshelton* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Needs a signoff - can you `git commit --amend -s` and re-push?

Good question - since it's a one-character change, I made it through the GitHub web-UI rather than manually… did I miss a tick-box somewhere to sign-off the commit, or can you not do this via the UI?

I'll try to pull and amend locally...

> > Needs a signoff - can you `git commit --amend -s` and re-push?
> 
> Good question - since it's a one-character change, I made it through the GitHub web-UI rather than manually… did I miss a tick-box somewhere to sign-off the commit, or can you not do this via the UI?
> 
> I'll try to pull and amend locally...

Should be fixed, hopefully...
CI is green, you're good. @containers/podman-maintainers PTAL
